refresh_policy.reproduce: Run the qbit regtest harness with --export-qbit-fixtures; review the generated manifest for exact qbitd values.
refresh_policy.diff_policy: Wallet-generated txids may change. Promote only reviewed qbitd output and keep the qbit commit/source metadata.
